title: ascogrammitis alan-smithii
intro: Ascogrammitis alan-smithii, also known as Alan-Smith's Grammitid, is a species of fern in the family Grammitidaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ascogrammitis alan-smithii include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or extracting the essential oils, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
